{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136694812?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ESPanda666", "id": 136694812, "login": "ESPanda666", "node_id": "U_kgDOCCXMHA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ESPanda666", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54309", "cvss": {"score": 10.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 10.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-306", "name": "Missing Authentication for Critical Function"}], "description": "## Impact
When `@n8n/mcp-browser` is run in HTTP transport mode, the MCP endpoint accepts session initialization and tool invocation requests without any authentication. Any network-reachable client, or any website visited by the user, can establish an MCP session and invoke browser-control tools.

Where the n8n AI Browser Bridge extension is installed and a browser connection is active, an unauthenticated caller can access browser-control capabilities including navigation, JavaScript evaluation, and cookie and storage access against the user's real browser profile.

This issue only affects instances where `@n8n/mcp-browser` is run with the HTTP transport (`--transport http`). The default transport is stdio, which is not affected.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 2.25.7, and 2.26.2. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Avoid running `@n8n/mcp-browser` with the HTTP transport; use the default stdio transport instead.
- If HTTP transport is required, restrict network access to the listening port to trusted clients only using host-based firewall rules.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00403, "percentile": 0.32511}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qrx8-25qr-5r7v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T23:32:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qrx8-25qr-5r7v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qrx8-25qr-5r7v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54309"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-23T16:17:01Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T23:32:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-qrx8-25qr-5r7v", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54309", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qrx8-25qr-5r7v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-qrx8-25qr-5r7v", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: MCP Browser HTTP Transport Exposes Unauthenticated Browser-Control Sessions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T13:39:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qrx8-25qr-5r7v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.26.0, < 2.26.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.25.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.25.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: MCP Browser HTTP Transport Exposes Unauthenticated Browser-Control Sessions
